rationale: MulAccByElement for ext×base in Regular case — 4 base muls vs 9 (Karatsuba), fused multiply-accumulate with AVX-512, eliminates scratch buffer
Eliminate localLinComb alloc+copy — accumulate directly into shared linComb slice (disjoint ranges). -50% B/op, -33% allocs/op
Fix MDHasher.SumElement buffer realloc — index-based consumption preserves backing array. no_sis allocs 16438→62 (-99.6%)
Pre-extract Regular slices in noSisTransversalHash — interface dispatch overhead is negligible vs Poseidon2 compute
Defer constant additions + MulByElement (4 vs 9 muls) — mixed case -7.16% but geomean -1.21% (only 1/4 benchmarks has constants)
CompressPoseidon2x16 SIMD for noSisTransversalHash — batch 16 columns at a time. rows_512/no_sis: -72.36%
Pre-extract Regular slices for SIMD transpose — interface dispatch not the bottleneck, cache misses dominate
Swap transpose loop order (row-major) — rows_512 -8.19% but geomean -1.60% below threshold
Combined loop swap + pre-extract — worse than loop swap alone, pre-extract overhead cancels cache benefit
Fuse butterfly+twiddle in FFT generic path — regression, separating allows better instruction pipelining
